org_constraint: Format the email using Markdown, with an unordered list of any required documents.
new_constraint: Use a numbered list for the required documents.

Subject: Request for Medical Records – [Patient Name] – Year 2002

Dear Records Department Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to formally request a copy of the medical records for my father, **[Father's Full Name]**, dated approximately **[Month/Year]** of **2002**. Due to administrative changes and age requirements, I am seeking a physical or digital copy through your official channels.

As his son/daughter/legal guardian, I have been authorized to access these records on his behalf. Please let me know if there is a specific fee associated with this retrieval or if additional verification is required to process the request.

To assist you in retrieving the file, please let me know if the following documentation is required. We will ensure all items are attached upon receipt of confirmation:

1.  Government-issued Photo Identification (Copy of Driver's License or Passport)
2.  Completed Release Form (Signed by the patient or legal guardian)
3.  Proof of Guardianship/Legal Authority (If applicable)
4.  Recent Utility Bill or Bank Statement (For address verification)

Please forward the completed intake instructions to the email address listed below or via mail to **[Facility Address]**.

Thank you for your time and assistance in this matter. I look forward to your prompt response.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Relationship to Patient]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Request for Medical Records – [Patient Name] – Year 2002

Dear Records Department Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to formally request a copy of the medical records for my father, **[Father's Full Name]**, dated approximately **[Month/Year]** of **2002**. Due to administrative changes and age requirements, I am seeking a physical or digital copy through your official channels.

As his son/daughter/legal guardian, I have been authorized to access these records on his behalf. Please let me know if there is a specific fee associated with this retrieval or if additional verification is required to process the request.

To assist you in retrieving the file, please let me know if the following documentation is required. We will ensure all items are attached upon receipt of confirmation:

1.  Government-issued Photo Identification (Copy of Driver's License or Passport)
2.  Completed Release Form (Signed by the patient or legal guardian)
3.  Proof of Guardianship/Legal Authority (If applicable)
4.  Recent Utility Bill or Bank Statement (For address verification)

Please forward the completed intake instructions to the email address listed below or via mail to **[Facility Address]**.

Thank you for your time and assistance in this matter. I look forward to your prompt response.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Relationship to Patient]<|im_end|>
